cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT (navi22, LLVM 15.0.6, DRM 3.52, 6.4.0-2mx-ahs-amd64)
notes: Apparently, as it turns out, the game will consistently crash on launch if you left it in windowed mode after your last session. This renders the game *permanently unplayable* unless you can find a way to delete or modify your settings data without deleting your save file. Unfortunately, there is no easy settings file, so good luck with any such endeavors.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6600 XT (navi23, LLVM 15.0.7, DRM 3.49, 6.1.12-arch1-1)
